title: Senior / HRIS Analyst - Basic + Allowance + AWS + VB (West) HSW
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Provide functional support for SAP SuccessFactors (Employee Central, Leave, Timesheet, Payroll, Reporting, Compensation, Performance & Goals, Recruiting, Learning, Onboarding, Offboarding).
  • Manage and support system integrations and related activities.
  • Conduct user training, prepare documentation, and provide post-go-live support.
  • Analyze business requirements, evaluate solutions, and recommend best practices.
  • Plan and execute Unit Testing, System Integration Testing (SIT), and support User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
  • Configure system solutions to enhance efficiency and compliance.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve system issues, working with vendors where needed.
  • Oversee system maintenance, upgrades, testing, and patch management.
  • Prepare and distribute regular HRIS reports to stakeholders.
  • Drive process alignment and standardization across regions.
  • Manage vendor agreements and annual HR system budget.
  • Execute mass data uploads and support audits.
  • Undertake any other reasonable duties / projects which may be required from time to time.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Computer Science, IT or IS-related major or focus.
  • Demonstrated expertise in supporting and configuring SAP SuccessFactors, with a 3-5 years of hands-on experience across multiple modules including Employee Central Core, Leave, Timesheet, Payroll, Reporting, Compensation, Performance & Goals, Recruiting, Learning, Onboarding, and Offboarding.
  • Strong track record in diagnosing and resolving both functional and technical issues within the SuccessFactors environment.
  • Technologically adept, with excellent communication and interpersonal skills, capable of effectively engaging and influencing stakeholders at all levels.
  • Strong in ABAP and Java.


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, kindly send your resume in MS WORD format or please click on “Apply Now”.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website

www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
